    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/endpoint/v3/eds.proto", "symbol": "EndpointDiscoveryService"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/status/v3/csds.proto", "symbol": "ClientStatusDiscoveryService"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/secret/v3/sds.proto", "symbol": "SecretDiscoveryService"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/load_stats/v3/lrs.proto", "symbol": "LoadReportingService"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/rate_limit_quota/v3/rlqs.proto", "symbol": "RateLimitQuotaService"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/extension/v3/config_discovery.proto", "symbol": "ExtensionConfigDiscoveryService"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/event_reporting/v3/event_reporting_service.proto", "symbol": "EventReportingService"},

    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/runtime/v3/rtds.proto", "symbol": "RuntimeDiscoveryService"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/health/v3/hds.proto", "symbol": "HealthDiscoveryService"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/redis_auth/v3/redis_external_auth.proto", "symbol": "RedisProxyExternalAuth"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e", "path": "src/proto/grpc/health/v1/health.proto", "symbol": "Health"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e", "path": "src/python/grpcio_health_checking/grpc_health/v1/health.py", "symbol": "HealthServicer"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e", "path": "src/cpp/server/health/default_health_check_service.h", "symbol": "DefaultHealthCheckService"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e", "path": "test/cpp/end2end/test_health_check_service_impl.h", "symbol": "HealthCheckServiceImpl"}
  ],
  "text": "## gRPC Service Definitions Shared Between Envoyproxy/Envoy and gRPC/gRPC\n\n### xDS Service Definitions in envoyproxy/data-plane-api\n\nThe envoyproxy/data-plane-api repository contains 21 gRPC service definitions across the envoy/service directory. These are collectively known as xDS (x Data Plane Services) and define the control plane API for Envoy proxy configuration:\n\n**Discovery Services (Core xDS):**\n1. **AggregatedDiscoveryService** (envoy/service/discovery/v3/ads.proto) - Aggregates multiple resource types over a single stream with methods StreamAggregatedResources and DeltaAggregatedResources\n2. **ClusterDiscoveryService (CDS)** (envoy/service/cluster/v3/cds.proto) - Discovers cluster configurations with StreamClusters, DeltaClusters, and FetchClusters methods\n3. **RouteDiscoveryService (RDS)** (envoy/service/route/v3/rds.proto) - Discovers route configurations with StreamRoutes, DeltaRoutes, and FetchRoutes methods\n4. **VirtualHostDiscoveryService** (envoy/service/route/v3/rds.proto) - Discovers virtual hosts dynamically with DeltaVirtualHosts method\n5. **ListenerDiscoveryService (LDS)** (envoy/service/listener/v3/lds.proto) - Discovers listener configurations with DeltaListeners, StreamListeners, and FetchListeners methods\n6. **EndpointDiscoveryService (EDS)** (envoy/service/endpoint/v3/eds.proto) - Discovers endpoint/cluster load assignments with StreamEndpoints, DeltaEndpoints, and FetchEndpoints methods\n7. **SecretDiscoveryService (SDS)** (envoy/service/secret/v3/sds.proto) - Discovers TLS secrets with DeltaSecrets, StreamSecrets, and FetchSecrets methods\n8. **RuntimeDiscoveryService (RTDS)** (envoy/service/runtime/v3/rtds.proto) - Discovers runtime configuration with StreamRuntime, DeltaRuntime, and FetchRuntime methods\n\n**Service Mesh & Operational Services:**\n9. **ClientStatusDiscoveryService (CSDS)** (envoy/service/status/v3/csds.proto) - Provides client configuration status visibility with StreamClientStatus and FetchClientStatus methods\n10. **HealthDiscoveryService (HDS)** (envoy/service/health/v3/hds.proto) - Configures Envoy as a health checker with StreamHealthCheck and FetchHealthCheck methods\n11. **LoadReportingService (LRS)** (envoy/service/load_stats/v3/lrs.proto) - Reports load statistics with StreamLoadStats method\n12. **ExtensionConfigDiscoveryService (ECDS)** (envoy/service/extension/v3/config_discovery.proto) - Discovers extension filter configurations with StreamExtensionConfigs, DeltaExtensionConfigs, and FetchExtensionConfigs methods\n\n**Filter & Authorization Services:**\n13. **Authorization** (envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.proto) - External authorization service with Check method for request authorization\n14. **RateLimitService** (envoy/service/ratelimit/v3/rls.proto) - Rate limiting decisions with ShouldRateLimit method\n15. **RateLimitQuotaService** (envoy/service/rate_limit_quota/v3/rlqs.proto) - Advanced quota management with StreamRateLimitQuotas method\n16. **RedisProxyExternalAuth** (envoy/service/redis_auth/v3/redis_external_auth.proto) - Redis protocol authentication with Authenticate method\n\n**Telemetry & Observation Services:**\n17. **AccessLogService (ALS)** (envoy/service/accesslog/v3/als.proto) - Streams access logs with StreamAccessLogs method\n18. **MetricsService** (envoy/service/metrics/v3/metrics_service.proto) - Streams metrics data with StreamMetrics method\n19. **EventReportingService** (envoy/service/event_reporting/v3/event_reporting_service.proto) - Reports health check and outlier detection events with StreamEvents method\n\n**External Processing Services:**\n20. **ExternalProcessor** (envoy/service/ext_proc/v3/external_processor.proto) - HTTP request/response processing with Process method\n21. **NetworkExternalProcessor** (envoy/service/network_ext_proc/v3/network_external_processor.proto) - L4 network traffic processing with Process method\n\n### gRPC Health Checking Service in grpc/grpc\n\nThe grpc/grpc repository implements the standard gRPC Health Checking Protocol (grpc.health.v1.Health) defined in the cross-org domain:\n\n**Service Definition:**\n- **Health** (src/proto/grpc/health/v1/health.proto) - Standard gRPC health checking protocol with Check and Watch methods\n  - Check method: Performs synchronous health check for a service\n  - Watch method: Streams health status changes for a service\n\n**Implementation Files:**\n1. **Python Implementation** (src/python/grpcio_health_checking/grpc_health/v1/health.py) - HealthServicer class implementing the Health service\n2. **Python Async Implementation** (src/python/grpcio_health_checking/grpc_health/v1/_async.py) - Async variant of HealthServicer\n3. **C++ Default Implementation** (src/cpp/server/health/default_health_check_service.cc/.h) - DefaultHealthCheckService and HealthCheckServiceImpl classes\n4. **C++ Test Implementation** (test/cpp/end2end/test_health_check_service_impl.h) - Test variant HealthCheckServiceImpl\n\n### Cross-Organization Service Linkage\n\nThe xDS services defined in envoyproxy/data-plane-api are consumed by Envoy proxy clients and can interact with gRPC services. The grpc.health.v1.Health service is commonly used by xDS control planes to perform health checks on Envoy instances. Both service ecosystems follow the gRPC protocol and are frequently deployed together in service mesh architectures like Kubernetes with control planes (e.g., Istio, Consul) that implement both the xDS APIs for configuration distribution and gRPC health checking for service observability."
}

**Target Repositories (version-pinned mirrors):**

- `github.com/sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2` — use `repo:^github.com/sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2$` filter
- `github.com/sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6` — use `repo:^github.com/sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6$` filter
- `github.com/sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e` — use `repo:^github.com/sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e$` filter

Scope ALL keyword_search/nls_search queries to these repos.
Use the repo name as the `repo` parameter for read_file/go_to_definition/find_references.


## Required Workflow

1. **Search first** — Use MCP tools to find relevant files and understand existing patterns
2. **Read remotely** — Use `sg_read_file` to read full file contents from Sourcegraph
3. **Edit locally** — Use Edit, Write, and Bash to create or modify files in your working directory
4. **Verify locally** — Run tests with Bash to check your changes

## Tool Selection

| Goal | Tool |
|------|------|
| Exact symbol/string | `sg_keyword_search` |
| Concepts/semantic search | `sg_nls_search` |
| Trace usage/callers | `sg_find_references` |
| See implementation | `sg_go_to_definition` |
| Read full file | `sg_read_file` |
| Browse structure | `sg_list_files` |
| Find repos | `sg_list_repos` |
| Search commits | `sg_commit_search` |
| Track changes | `sg_diff_search` |
| Compare versions | `sg_compare_revisions` |

**Decision logic:**
1. Know the exact symbol? → `sg_keyword_search`
2. Know the concept, not the name? → `sg_nls_search`
3. Need definition of a symbol? → `sg_go_to_definition`
4. Need all callers/references? → `sg_find_references`
5. Need full file content? → `sg_read_file`

## Scoping (Always Do This)

```
repo:^github.com/ORG/REPO$           # Exact repo (preferred)
repo:github.com/ORG/                 # All repos in org
file:.*\.ts$                         # TypeScript only
file:src/api/                        # Specific directory
```

Start narrow. Expand only if results are empty.

## Efficiency Rules

- Chain searches logically: search → read → references → definition
- Don't re-search for the same pattern; use results from prior calls
- Prefer `sg_keyword_search` over `sg_nls_search` when you have exact terms
- Read 2-3 related files before synthesising, rather than one at a time
- Don't read 20+ remote files without writing code — once you understand the pattern, start implementing

## If Stuck

If MCP search returns no results:
1. Broaden the search query (synonyms, partial identifiers)
2. Try `sg_nls_search` for semantic matching
3. Use `sg_list_files` to browse the directory structure
4. Use `sg_list_repos` to verify the repository name

# Cross-Org gRPC Service Definition Discovery

## Your Task

Find the gRPC service definitions that are shared between `envoyproxy/envoy` and `grpc/grpc`. Specifically: 1. In `envoyproxy/data-plane-api`, find all `.proto` files that define `service` declarations using `rpc` methods (the xDS service definitions). 2. In `grpc/grpc`, find the source files that implement the `grpc_health_v1.Health` service (the standard gRPC health checking protocol). Report the repo, file path, and service name for each.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the crossorg domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2, sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367, sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6, sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e.

**Note:** Additional repositories are accessible via Sourcegraph MCP tools:
- `sg-evals/envoy--v1.31.2` (envoyproxy/envoy)
- `sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367` (envoyproxy/data-plane-api)
- `sg-evals/go-control-plane--71637ad6` (envoyproxy/go-control-plane)
- `sg-evals/grpc--957dba5e` (grpc/grpc)

## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?

## Findings Summary

### **xDS Service Definitions** (21 services in `envoyproxy/data-plane-api`)

**Core Discovery Services:**
- AggregatedDiscoveryService (ADS)
- ClusterDiscoveryService (CDS)
- RouteDiscoveryService (RDS)
- ListenerDiscoveryService (LDS)
- EndpointDiscoveryService (EDS)
- SecretDiscoveryService (SDS)
- RuntimeDiscoveryService (RTDS)

**Operational Services:**
- ClientStatusDiscoveryService (CSDS)
- HealthDiscoveryService (HDS)
- LoadReportingService (LRS)
- ExtensionConfigDiscoveryService (ECDS)

**Filter & Authorization Services:**
- Authorization (external auth)
- RateLimitService & RateLimitQuotaService
- RedisProxyExternalAuth

**Telemetry & Processing Services:**
- AccessLogService (ALS)
- MetricsService
- EventReportingService
- ExternalProcessor (HTTP)
- NetworkExternalProcessor (L4)

### **gRPC Health Checking Service** (in `grpc/grpc`)

- **Health Service** (grpc.health.v1) with Check and Watch methods
- Multiple implementations: Python, Python async, and C++ variants
- Test implementations for verification

**File created:** `/workspace/answer.json` containing all repositories, file paths, service names, and detailed narrative explaining the cross-organization service linkage.

{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/discovery/v3/ads.proto"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.proto"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/ratelimit/v3/rls.proto"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/accesslog/v3/als.proto"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/metrics/v3/metrics_service.proto"},
    {"repo": "github.com/sg-evals/data-plane-api--84e84367", "path": "envoy/service/tap/v3/tap.proto"},

  "text": "## gRPC Service Definitions Shared Between Envoyproxy/Envoy and gRPC/gRPC\n\n### xDS Service Definitions in envoyproxy/data-plane-api\n\nThe envoyproxy/data-plane-api repository contains 21 gRPC service definitions across the envoy/service directory. These are collectively known as xDS (x Data Plane Services) and define the control plane API for Envoy proxy configuration:\n\n**Discovery Services (Core xDS):**\n1. **AggregatedDiscoveryService** (envoy/service/discovery/v3/ads.proto) - Aggregates multiple resource types over a single stream with methods StreamAggregatedResources and DeltaAggregatedResources\n2. **ClusterDiscoveryService (CDS)** (envoy/service/cluster/v3/cds.proto) - Discovers cluster configurations with StreamClusters, DeltaClusters, and FetchClusters methods\n3. **RouteDiscoveryService (RDS)** (envoy/service/route/v3/rds.proto) - Discovers route configurations with StreamRoutes, DeltaRoutes, and FetchRoutes methods\n4. **VirtualHostDiscoveryService** (envoy/service/route/v3/rds.proto) - Discovers virtual hosts dynamically with DeltaVirtualHosts method\n5. **ListenerDiscoveryService (LDS)** (envoy/service/listener/v3/lds.proto) - Discovers listener configurations with DeltaListeners, StreamListeners, and FetchListeners methods\n6. **EndpointDiscoveryService (EDS)** (envoy/service/endpoint/v3/eds.proto) - Discovers endpoint/cluster load assignments with StreamEndpoints, DeltaEndpoints, and FetchEndpoints methods\n7. **SecretDiscoveryService (SDS)** (envoy/service/secret/v3/sds.proto) - Discovers TLS secrets with DeltaSecrets, StreamSecrets, and FetchSecrets methods\n8. **RuntimeDiscoveryService (RTDS)** (envoy/service/runtime/v3/rtds.proto) - Discovers runtime configuration with StreamRuntime, DeltaRuntime, and FetchRuntime methods\n\n**Service Mesh & Operational Services:**\n9. **ClientStatusDiscoveryService (CSDS)** (envoy/service/status/v3/csds.proto) - Provides client configuration status visibility with StreamClientStatus and FetchClientStatus methods\n10. **HealthDiscoveryService (HDS)** (envoy/service/health/v3/hds.proto) - Configures Envoy as a health checker with StreamHealthCheck and FetchHealthCheck methods\n11. **LoadReportingService (LRS)** (envoy/service/load_stats/v3/lrs.proto) - Reports load statistics with StreamLoadStats method\n12. **ExtensionConfigDiscoveryService (ECDS)** (envoy/service/extension/v3/config_discovery.proto) - Discovers extension filter configurations with StreamExtensionConfigs, DeltaExtensionConfigs, and FetchExtensionConfigs methods\n\n**Filter & Authorization Services:**\n13. **Authorization** (envoy/service/auth/v3/external_auth.proto) - External authorization service with Check method for request authorization\n14. **RateLimitService** (envoy/service/ratelimit/v3/rls.proto) - Rate limiting decisions with ShouldRateLimit method\n15. **RateLimitQuotaService** (envoy/service/rate_limit_quota/v3/rlqs.proto) - Advanced quota management with StreamRateLimitQuotas method\n16. **RedisProxyExternalAuth** (envoy/service/redis_auth/v3/redis_external_auth.proto) - Redis protocol authentication with Authenticate method\n\n**Telemetry & Observation Services:**\n17. **AccessLogService (ALS)** (envoy/service/accesslog/v3/als.proto) - Streams access logs with StreamAccessLogs method\n18. **MetricsService** (envoy/service/metrics/v3/metrics_service.proto) - Streams metrics data with StreamMetrics method\n19. **EventReportingService** (envoy/service/event_reporting/v3/event_reporting_service.proto) - Reports health check and outlier detection events with StreamEvents method\n\n**External Processing Services:**\n20. **ExternalProcessor** (envoy/service/ext_proc/v3/external_processor.proto) - HTTP request/response processing with Process method\n21. **NetworkExternalProcessor** (envoy/service/network_ext_proc/v3/network_external_processor.proto) - L4 network traffic processing with Process method\n\n### gRPC Health Checking Service in grpc/grpc\n\nThe grpc/grpc repository implements the standard gRPC Health Checking Protocol (grpc.health.v1.Health) defined in the cross-org domain:\n\n**Service Definition:**\n- **Health** (src/proto/grpc/health/v1/health.proto) - Standard gRPC health checking protocol with Check and Watch methods\n  - Check method: Performs synchronous health check for a service\n  - Watch method: Streams health status changes for a service\n\n**Implementation Files:**\n1. **Python Implementation** (src/python/grpcio_health_checking/grpc_health/v1/health.py) - HealthServicer class implementing the Health service\n2. **Python Async Implementation** (src/python/grpcio_health_checking/grpc_health/v1/_async.py) - Async variant of HealthServicer\n3. **C++ Default Implementation** (src/cpp/server/health/default_health_check_service.cc/.h) - DefaultHealthCheckService and HealthCheckServiceImpl classes\n4. **C++ Test Implementation** (test/cpp/end2end/test_health_check_service_impl.h) - Test variant HealthCheckServiceImpl\n\n### Cross-Organization Service Linkage\n\nThe xDS services defined in envoyproxy/data-plane-api are consumed by Envoy proxy clients and can interact with gRPC services. The grpc.health.v1.Health service is commonly used by xDS control planes to perform health checks on Envoy instances. Both service ecosystems follow the gRPC protocol and are frequently deployed together in service mesh architectures like Kubernetes with control planes (e.g., Istio, Consul) that implement both the xDS APIs for configuration distribution and gRPC health checking for service observability."
}
